parameters.description: View type. Supported values: inbox, sent, drafts, starred, all, important, other, user:<label>

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor value. Base64 encoded timestamp and item id, separated by |.

ApiAttachmentDraft.description: API representation of a draft attachment on a message.

ApiAttachmentForwarded.description: API representation of a forwarded attachment on a message.

ApiContactInfo.description: API representation of a contact (sender or recipient).

ApiDraftContactInfo.description: Contact info for draft request/response (backward-compatible with MessageToSend shape).

ApiDraftInput.description: The draft input matching the current `MessageToSend` JSON shape for backward compat.

db_id.description: Existing message DB ID (for updating an existing draft).

replying_to_id.description: ID of the message this draft is replying to.

ApiDraftOutput.description: The draft output matching the current `MessageToSend` JSON shape for backward compat.

ApiMessage.description: API representation of a fully assembled email message.

ApiMessageAttachment.description: API representation of a provider attachment on a message.

ApiMessageLabel.description: API representation of a label on a message.

ApiSortMethod.description: common types of sorts based on timestamps

ApiThread.description: API representation of a fully assembled email thread.

Attachment.description: Attachments of a message, as sent to us by the provider.

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft message this attachment belongs to.

file_name.description: Original file name of the attachment.

s3_key.description: S3 object key where the attachment content is stored.

sha.description: SHA-256 hash of the file content for integrity verification.

AttachmentForwarded.description:
A forwarded attachment linking a draft to an original message's attachment.
Data is fetched from Gmail at send time rather than stored in S3.

attachment_id.description: The UUID of the original attachment in email_attachments.

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft message this forwarded attachment belongs to.

filename.description: Original file name of the attachment.

message_provider_id.description: The Gmail message ID of the original message containing the attachment.

provider_attachment_id.description: The Gmail attachment ID for fetching data from Gmail API.

email_address.description: The email address of the sender to block.

filter_id.description: The ID of the filter created in Gmail.

CreateDraftResponse.description: Response body for creating a draft.

CreateLabelResponse.description: The response returned from the create label endpoint

EmptyResponse.description: Empty response is required due to custom fetch forcing `response.json()`

ErrorResponse.description:
A plain old json error response for use with axum.

The globally unique Message-ID header value created by the sender to uniquely identify this email
Used for threading across all providers (In-Reply-To header, References header)
